subcodes.first_line: Ordain for me, O my God, through Thy Most Exalted Pen, that which Thou hast ordained for Thy chosen ones [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قدر لی یا الهی من قلمک الاعلی ما قدرته لاصفیائک
subcodes.subjects: @Manifestation of God as sun, @prayer for nearness to God, @prayer for spiritual recognition
